steps.t: Fallen men are scattered upon the ground at the Fords of Isen. You should search the men on the ground.
Fallen men are scattered upon the ground at the Fords of Isen. You should search the men on the ground.
An injured soldier lies ahead at the river's edge. You should run to the injured man's side.
Search for Grimbold among the chaos at the ford.
Grimbold stands at Prince Théodred's grave at the Fords of Isen. You should tell Grimbold no. <rgb=#FF0000>NOTE: This quest requires emotes. Sel…
Grimbold stands at Prince Théodred's grave at the Fords of Isen.
The soldiers have gathered around Grimbold and yourself. You should ask the soldiers what they think.
The men have retreated backwards into the Westfold, and you should follow.
